description: Past sessions browser. Backend is in (URI scheme sessions://list, sessions://latest, sessions://<id>); the Latest response pane already exercises it. Remaining work builds the full browser surface.

items.after: table of sessions: id, mtime, size, first-user-message preview; reverse-mtime sorted
click row to expand inline; render filtered user/assistant turns in order (skip permission-mode, file-history-snapshot)
